summary: Employee Management Unified Layout - All features tested and working. Backend: 12/12 tests passed. Frontend: All UI flows verified including Puesto selector, permissions customization, Restablecer, Create Puesto dialog, Training mode, and New Employee flow.
passed_tests: TestRolesAPI::test_02_roles_spanish_labels - Roles have Spanish names (Mesero, Cajero, Cocina)
TestUserAPI::test_01_get_user_by_id - Carlos loaded with waiter role
TestUserAPI::test_03_users_have_spanish_role_label_in_response - Role codes in API, Spanish in frontend
frontend_tests_passed: Users tab shows Spanish role labels (Mesero, Cajero, Cocina)
UserConfig page loads with unified layout (no tabs)
Puesto selector shows all roles as clickable pills
Current role (Mesero) highlighted with checkmark and scale-105
Clicking Cajero changes role and reloads permissions (toast: 'Puesto: Cajero')
Permissions grid shows categories with expand/collapse
'especial' badges show when permissions differ from role defaults
Crear Puesto button opens dialog with input field
Training mode switch toggles and shows badge in header
New employee page (/user/new) loads with correct title
Mesero is default role for new employees
updated_files: /app/backend/tests/test_employee_management.py - Created test file for employee management features
context_for_next_testing_agent: Employee management redesign is complete and working. The UserConfig.js page has been rewritten from 3-tab to unified layout. Builtin roles now have 'code' field added in backend. Custom roles that duplicate builtins are filtered out in frontend. Test file /app/backend/tests/test_employee_management.py covers all CRUD operations.

features_verified.unified_layout: LEFT: Employee data (name, PIN, photo), Contacto, Empleo sections. RIGHT: Puesto selector with pills, Permissions grid with categories
features_verified.puesto_selector: 5 builtin roles + custom roles shown as pills. Selected role highlighted with checkmark and scale. Clicking changes role and loads defaults.
features_verified.permissions_customization: Individual toggles work. 'especial' tags show when permission differs from role default.
features_verified.restablecer_button: Resets permissions to current role defaults with toast confirmation
features_verified.crear_puesto_dialog: Opens dialog with name input and CREAR PUESTO button
features_verified.training_mode: Toggle switch in header. Shows 'ENTRENAMIENTO' badge when enabled.
features_verified.spanish_labels: All UI in Spanish: Mesero, Cajero, Cocina, etc.
